g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers an exchange book change?')
sendPrompt('What is the OMD-C market data feed and what does it stream?')
sendPrompt('How does a firm build and maintain their internal book replica?')
sendPrompt('What does the strategy logic do with the internal book?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the strategy makes a decision?')
sendPrompt('What is the OCG-C gateway and how do firms optimise order submission?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the exchange receives the order?')
